Items.Title: France 3-1 Senegal: Magic Kylian Mbappe moves closer to World Cup record, how Didier Deschamps changed the game and the cause for concern for Les Bleus despite win over Senegal, writes RIATH AL-SAMARRAI
Items.Description: FRANCE 3-1 SENEGAL - RIATH AL-SAMARRAI IN NEW JERSEY:Even on his bad days, no one changes the course of a World Cup match quite like Kylian Mbappe.

Items.Title: Olise is your man of the match in France World Cup opener
Items.Description: While Kylian Mbappe grabbed the headlines by scoring a double to become France's all-time top scorer, it was Michael Olise who topped your player ratings in their World Cup opener against Senegal.

Items.Title: Kylian Mbappe’s unusual celebration for France against Senegal explained
Items.Description: Kylian Mbappe scored twice against Senegal to get France’s World Cup campaign off to a flying start
